title: LEXININ 5 Pack Large Plastic Fast Food Trays, 16 x 12 Inch Yellow Plastic Serving Dinner Trays for Drinks, Food, Restaurant, 41 x 30cm
features: MATERIAL - The fast food serving tray is made of durable plastic material, which is wear-resistant and not easily broken. The four corners of the fast food trays are rounded for added aesthetic appeal and peace of mind when using the tray.
LARGE SIZE - You will receive a total of 5 pieces of yellow plastic food trays, each measuring 41.5 x 30.5cm, providing sufficient space to accommodate various fast food dishes to meet your needs.

CAREFULLY DESIGNED - The bottom of the plastic dinner tray has a raised design, which allows for a certain gap between your tray and the table, allowing for better ventilation. When stacked and stored, it will not easily stick together, making it easy to handle.
WIDELY USED - Rectangle plastic trays are widely used for storing dishes, desserts, or snacks in places such as weddings, hotels, cafeterias, homes, and fast food restaurants.
description: Product Description Material: Plastic Color: Yellow Size: 12x16.33 Inch/305x415 mm PACKAGE: 5 x Yellow Plastic Fast Food Tray Surface Smooth Use Convenient Not Easily Damaged Deformed Store Dishes Store Desserts Store Snacks Durable Wear-Resistant High Hardness
